title: The Mysterious Shell
body: You find a shell that whispers secrets of the ocean. What do you hear?

title: The Sand Castle Guardian
body: A tiny crab asks you to help protect its sand castle kingdom from the tide.

title: The Talking Oak
body: An ancient tree speaks! It needs your help to find its lost acorns.

title: The Fairy Ring
body: You discover a circle of mushrooms. Step inside and see what happens...

title: The Flying Frisbee
body: A magical frisbee lands at your feet and refuses to stay on the ground!

title: The Invisible Friend
body: Someone is giggling nearby, but you can't see them. Can you find them?
